[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: dao_protocol: close all 3 deferred impl gaps (inventory enqueue, attachment upload, email onboarding)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/41
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/42
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/203
  
  Details:
  Completed the final implementation work on the Edgar -> dao_protocol (FastAPI) extraction by porting the three previously-deferred Rails behaviours into the Python service, all deployed gate-off on seni_ror_new:8010 with 58 passing unit tests.
  
  #41: ASSET RECEIPT -> inventory-snapshot enqueue (jobs/inventory_snapshot.py; corrected to the real GAS GET action+token shape) wired into dispatch.py; and /dao attachment -> GitHub contents upload (services/github_upload.py) wired into routes/dao.py.
  
  #42: email onboarding handshake (registration + verification) ported from DaoEmailRegistrationService + Gdrive::ContributorsDigitalSignatures into email_registration.py + sheets/contributors_digital_signatures.py (cols A-H, single-use verification-key consume, ACTIVE/VERIFYING/pubkey-mismatch outcomes), wired into routes/dao.py returning 422 on failure. Only the client loopback was machine-bound; the server side is portable.
  
  All three are gate-off safe (missing GAS/PAT env -> clean error, matching Rails). Tracker + provisioning checklist updated (#203).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
